scripts.tool: npm run check:ascii && npm run lint:md && npm run check:links
scripts.check:ascii: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const root=process.cwd(); const bad=[]; const textExt=new Set(['.md','.json','.toml','.yml','.yaml']); function walk(dir){ for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){ if(entry.name==='.git'||entry.name==='node_modules'){ continue; } const full=path.join(dir,entry.name); if(entry.isDirectory()){ walk(full); continue; } if(!entry.isFile()||!textExt.has(path.extname(entry.name))){ continue; } const lines=fs.readFileSync(full,'utf8').split(/\r?\n/); lines.forEach((line,index)=>{ for(const char of line){ if(char.charCodeAt(0)>127){ bad.push(path.relative(root,full)+':' +(index+1)+': non-ASCII character '+JSON.stringify(char)); break; } } }); } } walk(root); if(bad.length){ console.error(bad.join('\n')); process.exit(1); } console.log('ASCII check passed');"
scripts.check:links:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const root=process.cwd(); const markdownFiles=[]; const backtickFence=String.fromCharCode(96,96,96); function walk(dir){ for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){ if(entry.name==='.git'||entry.name==='node_modules'){ continue; } const full=path.join(dir,entry.name); if(entry.isDirectory()){ walk(full); continue; } if(entry.isFile()&&entry.name.endsWith('.md')){ markdownFiles.push(full); } } } function stripFences(text){ const lines=text.split(/?
/); let fenced=false; return lines.filter((line)=>{ const trimmed=line.trimStart(); if(trimmed.startsWith(backtickFence)||trimmed.startsWith('~~~')){ fenced=!fenced; return false; } return !fenced; }).join('
'); } walk(root); const bad=[]; const linkPattern=/\[[^\]]+\]\((?!https?:|mailto:|#)([^)]+)\)/g; for(const file of markdownFiles){ const text=stripFences(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8')); let match; while((match=linkPattern.exec(text))){ const target=match[1].split('#')[0]; if(!target){ continue; } const resolved=path.resolve(path.dirname(file),target); if(!fs.existsSync(resolved)){ bad.push(path.relative(root,file)+' -> '+match[1]); } } } if(bad.length){ console.error(bad.join('
')); process.exit(1); } console.log('checked '+markdownFiles.length+' markdown files');"
